analysis.reasoning: Core message: Cites Premier Li stating that peace, development, cooperation, and exchange are the trend; regardless of external changes, China will open wider and move forward in opening-up. Evaluation: CH1 (West immoral/hostile): Not present; no criticism of the West or depiction of hostility. CH2 (China is a benevolent power): Yes; emphasizes peaceful development, cooperation, openness to the world, projecting China as cooperative and beneficial internationally. CH3 (epic history): Not referenced. CH4 (appropriate political system and honorable values): Partially adjacent but the focus is external openness rather than domestic system/values; not clearly advocated. CH5 (CCP governance succeeds): Implicit positivity about progress, but no concrete claims about governmental success or achievements; not supported. CH6 (culture/nature/heritage): Not applicable. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH2.
